features.name: Frontend Static File Serving
features.description: Built React dashboard (client/dist/) served automatically by FastAPI via StaticFiles mount at /. Single-command make run builds frontend + starts API.

tests.notes: Verification is manual — start server and navigate to /

subtasks.name: Mount StaticFiles in api/main.py after API routes
Add client-install, client-build, run targets to Makefile
Update API client to use relative URLs by default for same-origin serving

features.notes: Frontend mount is conditional (skipped if client/dist/ doesn't exist). API-only dev workflow unchanged.

features.name: Manual Testing via Frontend Dashboard
features.description: Upload an image through the React dashboard UI, run the full detection pipeline on it, and see violation results, annotated image, and challan generation in real-time.

tests.notes: Frontend integration — verification is manual.

subtasks.name: Add image upload widget to LiveDetection page
Display violation results and annotated image
Add "Generate Challan" action from test results

features.notes: POST /api/violations/upload endpoint exists. Only frontend work needed.

features.name: Frontend Application Shell
features.description: App layout with sidebar navigation, top navbar, dark/light theme toggle, page transition animations, and settings page.

tests.notes: Manual verification — start server and navigate routes.

features.notes: Conditional static file serving via FastAPI StaticFiles mount.

features.name: Frontend Dashboard & Analytics
features.description: Dashboard page with real-time KPI cards, trend chart, recent activity feed, camera placeholder. Analytics page with trend chart, pie chart, top offenders ranking.

tests.notes: 4 unit tests for type/severity breakdown, weekday trend, offender ranking.

subtasks.name: Dashboard KPI cards from API summary
Analytics pie chart by violation type

features.notes: Backend GET /api/analytics/summary powers the KPI cards.

features.name: Frontend Shared Component Library
features.description: Reusable UI components: Badge, ViolationCard, PlateNumber, ConfidenceMeter, AsyncBoundary (loading/error/empty), StatCard, KPICard, StatusBadge, SectionHeader, ActivityRow. Plus data layer: useFetch hook, API client, constants, types, badge classes, build config (Vite+TS+Tailwind). 23 unit tests across 6 test files.

tests.notes: 23 tests across 6 files.

subtasks.name: Build config (Vite 8, TS 5, Tailwind 4, Vitest 4, ESLint)

features.notes: Components are tree-shaken, Tailwind CSS v4 with CSS variables for theming.

features.name: Image Preprocessing
features.description: CLAHE low-light enhancement + basic resize applied before detection.
features.notes: Implemented CLAHE with threshold < 60 luminance.

features.name: Helmet Violation Detection
features.description: Fine-tuned YOLOv8m detects WithHelmet/WithoutHelmet/TripleRiding/Plate on the master dataset.

tests.notes: 5 unit tests for mapping logic. Full integration requires model weights.

features.notes: Model trained on Kaggle. Runs via ONNX Runtime (CPU) — no PyTorch inference overhead.

features.name: Triple Riding Detection
features.description: YOLOv8-Pose occupant counting within padded vehicle bbox.

tests.notes: 3 tests for pose counting, edge bboxes, empty images.

features.notes: Implemented with 0.3 padding ratio.

features.name: License Plate Recognition
features.description: Plate detection + OnnxOCR (PP-OCRv5 via ONNX Runtime) + KA-format validation/correction.

tests.notes: 4 unit tests covering formatting, valid plates, OCR confusion correction, out-of-state rejection.

subtasks.name: Measure character accuracy on DataCluster sample

features.notes: KA RegEx and 8x character heuristic swaps implemented. Replaced PaddleOCR with OnnxOCR (no PaddlePaddle dependency). evaluate_lpr() in src/evaluate.py computes char/plate accuracy on 47-image DataCluster dataset (20 with GT).

features.name: Evidence Packaging
features.description: Annotated image + JSON metadata + SHA-256 hash, with legal section mapping.

tests.notes: 8 tests: hash, severity, legal sections including seatbelt/stop_line/illegal_parking.

features.notes: LEGAL_MAP extended with seatbelt (S194B), stop_line (S119/177), illegal_parking (S122).

features.name: Backend REST API
features.description: FastAPI service exposing violations, analytics, evidence, and challans endpoints.

tests.notes: 11 tests: violations CRUD, analytics, evidence, challans CRUD.

features.notes: 8/8 original endpoints + 3 challans endpoints all implemented and tested.

features.name: Evaluation Script
features.description: Precision/recall/F1 on the test set for the detector, plus LPR character/plate-level accuracy, written to outputs/metrics.json.

tests.notes: Produced metrics.json: P=0.866, R=0.703, mAP50=0.796.

features.notes: Model evaluation ran successfully on test split (194 images, 311 instances).

features.name: Sample Annotated Outputs (50+)
features.description: Run the end-to-end pipeline on 50+ images to generate annotated evidence images and corresponding JSONL records.

tests.notes: Pipeline integration passing via mocks.

features.notes: Pipeline orchestration implemented. violations.jsonl populated once trained model is placed.

features.name: Optional LLM-Assisted Violations
features.description: Groq vision LLM (meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct) checks for mobile_phone, wrong_side_driving, red_light, seatbelt, stop_line, illegal_parking.
features.notes: All 6 classifications enabled in config. Requires GROQ_API_KEY and llm_violations.enabled: true.

features.name: Challans API
features.description: CRUD endpoints for traffic challans (e-tickets). POST to create from a violation, GET list/detail with fine computation and legal section mapping.

tests.notes: 3 backend API tests + 3 client API tests.

subtasks.name: Client ChallanDetail handles API fetch + preview
ViolationDetail generate challan → POST then navigate

features.notes: Fine map and legal section map in challans route mirror evidence.py. Persisted to outputs/challans.jsonl.

features.name: Computational Efficiency & Scalability Evaluation
features.description: Measure wall-clock time per pipeline stage (preprocess, detect, OCR, LLM), throughput in images/sec, and memory usage. Output as extended metrics.json section under 'benchmark' key.

tests.notes: 5 unit tests for benchmark_pipeline.

subtasks.name: Add psutil dependency for memory tracking

features.notes: Reports per-stage timing (mean/std/min/max), throughput, peak memory, and hardware info. psutil fallback if not installed. All pipeline stages instrumented individually. Merges into existing metrics.json without clobbering.

features.name: CI Pipeline
features.description: GitHub Actions CI workflow with two jobs: backend (uv sync --frozen, black --check, pytest) and frontend (npm ci, tsc typecheck, vite build). Runs on push/PR to main.

tests.notes: CI is the runner, not a tested module. Backend and frontend tests run within CI.

subtasks.name: Backend job: uv setup, black check, pytest
Frontend job: npm ci, typecheck, build

features.notes: Lean CI — no Docker build, no Python matrix. Easy to extend later.

features.name: Model & OCR Migration: .pt + RapidOCR
features.description: Reverted to native YOLOv8 .pt inference (ultralytics) instead of ONNX export. PaddleOCR replaced by RapidOCR (rapidocr-onnxruntime). torch remains CPU-only via the CPU-only pypi index. Dropped ~5GB of CUDA/nvidia deps and ~200MB PaddlePaddle framework overhead. Target: <400MB steady-state on Render 512MB free tier.
features.module: src/detector.py, src/triple_riding.py, src/lpr.py, pyproject.toml, Dockerfile, Makefile

tests.notes: All 42 tests passing. Pipeline verified end-to-end on 11 sample images.

subtasks.name: Revert detector inference to native .pt (ultralytics YOLO)
Switch torch to CPU-only index (remove CUDA deps)
Replace PaddleOCR with RapidOCR in src/lpr.py
Update Dockerfile: remove ULTRALYTICS_SKIP_REQUIREMENTS_CHECKS, trim env vars
Update Makefile: download .pt files from HuggingFace instead of .onnx

features.notes: Best.pt and yolov8n-pose.pt hosted on HF at arnav-gupta/traffic-violation-prototype. onnxocr and onnxruntime removed from deps; rapidocr-onnxruntime added. make download-model downloads .pt files.

features.name: Render Deployment (Docker)
features.description: Multi-stage Dockerfile with uv, CPU-only torch index, ONNX models, PORT env var support, healthcheck, and .dockerignore for clean builds on Render.

tests.notes: Manual — deploy and verify /health responds.

subtasks.name: Fix libgl1 package name for slim
Use $PORT env var in CMD and healthcheck

features.notes: llm_classifier gracefully degrades if GROQ_API_KEY not set. CPU torch to save ~5GB install size. OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 + MALLOC_ARENA_MAX=2 for memory efficiency.

features.name: Computational Efficiency & Scalability Assessment Document
features.description: docs/compute_efficiency.md — detailed analysis of per-stage pipeline timing, memory usage, throughput, scalability bottlenecks, and recommendations based on real benchmark_pipeline() output.

tests.notes: Documentation only — no tests needed.

features.notes: References real metrics from outputs/metrics.json 'benchmark' key. Covers per-stage timing/memory, GPU projection, horizontal scaling estimates.

features.name: Production Upgrade Path Document
features.description: docs/production_upgrade.md — how to evolve from prototype to production-grade system covering architecture, infrastructure (queues, DB, storage), model serving, edge deployment, observability, CI/CD, security, compliance, cost estimates, and migration roadmap.

tests.notes: Documentation only — no tests needed.

features.notes: Covers 11 sections including architecture diagrams, schema design, cost estimates (₹1.85L/mo for 500 cameras), and 5-phase migration roadmap.

features.name: Docker Image Published to Docker Hub
features.description: Multi-stage Docker image built and published to docker.io/eros483/traffic-violation-detection:latest. Includes React frontend, FastAPI backend, model weights, and optional GROQ_API_KEY for LLM features. Judges can run with a single docker run command.

tests.notes: Manual — pull and run the image, verify /health responds.

subtasks.name: Add docker-build, docker-push, docker-run targets to Makefile
Add Docker quick-start section to README

features.notes: Image is ~703MB compressed. CV-only features work without any env vars. LLM features need GROQ_API_KEY.

features.name: Periodic YouTube Capture on Dashboard
features.description: Dashboard polls `POST /api/violations/youtube/upload` every 20s with incrementing timestamp, runs extracted frame through detection pipeline, and displays annotated image + violation results inline with a start/stop toggle.

tests.notes: 11 unit tests: URL validation, ffmpeg errors, quality helpers, video info, cleanup, batch extraction, context manager.

subtasks.name: Fix base64 encoding of annotated image (cv2.imencode before b64encode)
Implement periodic capture interval + UI on Dashboard
Fix yt-dlp live stream format filter for live HLS streams
Fix ffmpeg at() filter (does not exist in ffmpeg) — replaced with -ss seeking
Fix _download_video_segment path resolution and add download timeout for live streams
Add missing logger import in api/routes/violations.py

features.notes: Fixed 3 bugs: (1) ffmpeg at() filter replaced with -ss seeking, (2) yt-dlp prepare_filename replaced with requested_downloads fallback, socket_timeout=30 for live streams, (3) missing logger import in violations.py. 11 unit tests added. yt-dlp live stream download may still time out on very long DVR streams — download_ranges now caps at ±5s window around requested timestamp when is_live=true.
